diversity_basis.citation: BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 § 311.1 — engineer-declared sub-feeder; diversity computed at downstream board

selectivity_results.code_clause: BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 § 536 + BS EN 60947-2:2017 — 400A main MCCB upstream of 100A feeder MCCB at F01; ratio 4:1 sits well above the 2:1 same-curve cascade threshold; both devices share 36 kA Icu so breaking capacity is matched across the cascade. Engineer-declared verdict is firm without a manufacturer cascade-table lookup at this 9.8 kA declared PFC.
BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 § 536 + BS EN 60947-2:2017 — 400A main MCCB upstream of 100A feeder MCCB at F02; 4:1 ratio + matched 36 kA Icu mirror the F01 cascade analysis.

BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 § 536 + BS EN 60947-2:2017 — 400A main MCCB upstream of 100A feeder MCCB at F03; 4:1 ratio + matched 36 kA Icu mirror the F01 cascade analysis. F03 is the longest feeder (45m) in the cascade — downstream Zs verification deferred to the fault-level skill.

assumptions: BS EN 61439-1 Type-Tested Assembly used for the MSB.
DNO declared PFC of 9.8kA at intake; MCCBs selected with 36kA Icu (BS EN 60947-2).
Final-circuit RCDs applied at sub-DBs (SDB-GF/L1/L2), not at MSB feeder level — preserves selectivity.

drawing_notes: MSB-MAIN located in ground-floor plant room.
Three feeders to per-floor sub-DBs (SDB-GF, SDB-L1, SDB-L2).
Spare ways: 3 (W10-W12 reserved for future expansion).

rationale.chat_summary: MSB-MAIN: 400A TPN+E main switchboard for a UK 3-storey commercial office, fed from a DNO TN-C-S 400V intake at 9.8 kA declared PFC. Three feeders distribute power to per-floor sub-DBs (SDB-GF, SDB-L1, SDB-L2) via 100A Type D MCCBs on 35mm² 5-core SWA. BS EN 61439-2 PSC enclosure, IP4X for indoor plant-room conditions, 36 kA Icu across the cascade. Selectivity verified at 4:1 ratio for all three feeders; downstream Zs verification at the 45m F03 feeder deferred to the fault-level skill.

sections.title: Board Identification
sections.summary: MSB-MAIN is the commercial main switchboard for a UK 3-storey office, located in the ground-floor plant room adjacent to the DNO intake. Built as a BS EN 61439-1/-2 Type-Tested Assembly (PSC — Power Switchgear and Controlgear assembly) with IP4X rating suited to the indoor plant-room environment. Role flagged as `commercial_main_switchboard` so downstream consumers (riser, cable-containment, earthing) recognise the main-feeder character and three-floor cascade topology even though the `specialty_board` discriminator is used.

decisions.label: Board role flagged as commercial_main_switchboard
decisions.summary: Signals commercial main-feeder function and three-floor cascade topology to downstream skills (riser, cable-containment, earthing); the role field carries the engineering hierarchy even though the IR discriminator is specialty_board.

decisions.label: BS EN 61439-2 PSC TTA enclosure, IP4X
decisions.summary: PSC-class Type-Tested Assembly per BS EN 61439-2 is the UK commercial-MSB default; IP4X protects against solid objects ≥1 mm in the indoor plant-room environment — no water-ingress provision needed.

sections.title: Incoming Supply
sections.summary: 400A TPN+E intake at 400V fed from a UK DNO TN-C-S 400V (PME) substation. DNO declared prospective fault current at the origin is 9.8 kA — comfortably covered by the 400A main MCCB at 36 kA Icu and downstream 100A feeder MCCBs sharing the same 36 kA rating. Ze at origin is not explicitly stated in the IR; typical DNO TN-C-S declarations sit around 0.35 Ω and the Zs cascade to socket terminals is deferred to the fault-level skill for explicit calculation.

decisions.label: 400A TPN+E intake from DNO TN-C-S (PME)
decisions.summary: Office maximum demand ~86 kVA after BS 7671 § 311.1 + IET OSG Appendix A diversity sits comfortably within the 400A intake; TN-C-S is the UK DNO default for new commercial connections.
decisions.rule: Intake sizing from maximum demand + diversity
decisions.code_clause: BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 § 311.1 + IET On-Site Guide Appendix A

decisions.label: Declared PFC 9.8 kA at DNO intake
decisions.summary: DNO declared value — 400A main MCCB at 36 kA Icu and 100A feeder MCCBs sharing 36 kA Icu both clear the threshold with substantial margin for future DNO network reinforcement.

decisions.label: Main switch type: MCCB
decisions.summary: 400A MCCB combines isolation with electronic/thermal-magnetic short-circuit interruption per BS EN 60947-2; UK commercial-MSB default for intake-rated devices above 250A.

sections.title: Circuit Breakdown
sections.summary: 3 feeders to per-floor sub-DBs: F01 → SDB-GF (15m, 30 kW), F02 → SDB-L1 (30m, 28 kW), F03 → SDB-L2 (45m, 28 kW). All three feeders use 100A Type D MCCBs on 35mm² 5-core SWA cable. Type D curve handles inrush from downstream HVAC FCU motor loads and IT equipment switching supplies without nuisance trip. No RCD on the feeders — RCD coverage is deferred to the sub-DBs at final-circuit level per BS 7671 § 411.3.3, which preserves cascade selectivity.

decisions.label: Type D MCCBs on all three feeders
decisions.summary: Downstream sub-DBs carry HVAC FCU motor loads (Type C MCBs at 32A) and IT/comms switching supplies; Type D feeder ride-through prevents transient inrush from tripping the feeder before downstream MCBs operate.
decisions.rule: Feeder curve selection for mixed downstream loads

decisions.label: No RCD at MSB feeder level
decisions.summary: BS 7671 § 411.3.3 socket-RCD policy is satisfied at the sub-DB level (30mA Type A on each socket-bearing circuit). RCDs at MSB feeders would force series 30mA pairs and break selectivity — so RCD coverage is intentionally deferred downstream.
decisions.rule: RCD scope — push to lowest level that satisfies § 411.3.3

decisions.label: 35mm² 5-core SWA on all feeders
decisions.summary: Uniform cable size simplifies procurement and reflects the 100A feeder OCPD; 5-core delivers TPN+E topology. Voltage-drop check on F03 (45m, longest run) deferred to cable-sizing skill — at 100A and 35mm² Cu (1.10 mV/A/m line-line), indicative drop is ≈ 1.24% / 4.95V on 400V line-line, within BS 7671 Appendix 12 limits but close enough that the cable-sizing skill must confirm with the actual load current.
decisions.rule: Feeder cable selection — uniform sizing across cascade

sections.title: Selectivity Analysis
sections.summary: Three-feeder cascade: 400A main MCCB upstream of three 100A Type D feeder MCCBs (F01/F02/F03), each feeding a 100A switch-disconnector at the downstream SDB. Cascade ratio at every feeder is 400:100 = 4:1, comfortably above the 2:1 IEC same-curve cascade threshold; matched 36 kA Icu across the main + all three feeders means both ends clear the 9.8 kA DNO PFC. Engineer-declared verdict is firm for all three feeders without a manufacturer cascade-table lookup, but a downstream tool-call may still be desirable to confirm the SDB main-switch + final-MCB cascade at each floor's local PFC (≈6.0/4.5/3.5 kA after feeder impedance) — see each SDB's rationale.

decisions.label: 4:1 cascade ratio for all three feeders
decisions.summary: 400A:100A main-to-feeder MCCB ratio sits well above the 2:1 same-curve cascade threshold; ratio is uniform across F01/F02/F03 so the analysis carries identically.

decisions.label: 36 kA Icu matched across main + all feeders
decisions.summary: Main MCCB and all three feeder MCCBs share 36 kA Icu — covers 9.8 kA DNO declared PFC with ~3.7× margin; no cascade backup required.

sections.title: Compliance Assessment
sections.summary: MSB-MAIN compliant against BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 (intake protection § 411 / § 434, cable-sizing Appendix 4, voltage-drop Appendix 12, selectivity § 536), BS EN 61439-1:2021 + BS EN 61439-2:2021 (PSC TTA assembly construction), and BS EN 60947-2:2017 (MCCBs throughout). No CRITICAL or HIGH flags. One INFO note: voltage drop on the 45m F03 feeder (≈ 1.24% / 4.95V on 400V line-line at rated 100A) is close enough to the BS 7671 Appendix 12 limit that the downstream cable-sizing skill should confirm with the actual computed load current rather than the rated 100A.

decisions.label: BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 + BS EN 61439-2 citation discipline
decisions.summary: Protection clauses cite BS 7671 directly (UK is the source jurisdiction for the IET Wiring Regulations); enclosure construction cites BS EN 61439-2 as the PSC assembly standard.

decisions.label: PSC TTA enclosure construction
decisions.summary: Type-Tested Assembly built and verified per BS EN 61439-2:2021 — UK commercial-MSB default for the PSC class (intake-rated > 250A, fixed installation in plant rooms).

sections.title: Schedule Notes
sections.summary: Schedule emitted as 3-feeder table with 3 spare ways (W10-W12) reserved for future expansion (additional floor, plant-room sub-feed, or future EV/PV connection). Note: this board functions as the commercial main switchboard for the office but is classified as `specialty_board` in the IR rather than `main_switchboard` because BS 7671 commercial PSC switchboards conventionally account by feeder count rather than the `ways_total/used/spare` accounting that the `main_switchboard` discriminator branch requires — this reflects schema-shape pragmatism (precedent: ke-nairobi-industrial-100A-tpn), not engineering hierarchy. Role field carries the functional designation.

decisions.label: specialty_board classification despite main-switchboard function
decisions.summary: Board functions as commercial main switchboard; specialty_board classification reflects IR schema-shape pragmatism (BS 7671 PSC switchboards account by feeder count, not ways_total/used/spare), not engineering hierarchy — role field carries the functional designation. Mirrors the ke-nairobi-industrial-100A-tpn precedent.

decisions.label: 3 spare ways reserved (W10-W12)
decisions.summary: Commercial-expansion provision: additional floor sub-DB, plant-room sub-feed (CHW pumps, AHU control), or future EV-charging / PV-connection feeder.

invariants.evidence: INV-14 board MSB-MAIN (GB → BS): R1 jurisdiction→format mapping (GB/KE → BS 7671 §514) holds; R2 board_label.text+svg populated, no {{}} remnants; R3 board_label.text matches BS format regex; R4 3/3 circuits carry circuit_label.text+svg, no {{}} remnants; R5 every circuit_label.text matches BS circuit regex; R6 tool_call_pending booleans set on all labels.

INV-15 board MSB-MAIN (GB): all 3 circuits carry diversity_basis. load_types: other_declared×3 — all valid enum (Rule 1 PASS). factors: 1.0×3. Citations follow BS 7671 / IET OSG family — all ≥20 chars with recognisable clause markers (Reg / § / OSG / Table / CoP / TM) (Rule 2 PASS). Rule 3 N/A (no lift or ev_charger circuits on this board). Rule 4 N/A (no largest_plus_remainder_pct circuits — Rule 4 vacuously holds).
